external_known_theorems.name: Reeh-Schlieder
external_known_theorems.citation: Reeh & Schlieder, Nuovo Cimento 22 (1961); Haag, Local Quantum Physics
external_known_theorems.exact_role: vacuo ciclico e separador para algebras locais; a FORMA enunciavel ja' migrou para a testemunha-base (vac_cyclic_wedge / vac_separating_wedge)

external_known_theorems.name: Bisognano-Wichmann
external_known_theorems.exact_role: fluxo modular da cunha = boosts de Lorentz; o GRUPO a um parametro ja' e' DADO (WedgeModularData.modularFlow); o conteudo geometrico (=boosts) segue OPEN

external_known_theorems.name: local hyperfinite type III_1 under hypotheses
external_known_theorems.citation: Buchholz, D'Antoni & Fredenhagen, Commun. Math. Phys. 111 (1987) 123
external_known_theorems.exact_role: tipo da algebra da cunha; sem teoria de fatores na mathlib, nao-enunciavel hoje

external_known_theorems.name: Takesaki crossed product / continuous core
external_known_theorems.citation: Takesaki, Acta Math. 131 (1973) 249; Theory of Operator Algebras II
external_known_theorems.exact_role: core continuo com acao dual e traco escalante; a FORMA em DADOS ja' migrou (ContinuousCoreData: embedding + dualAction + canonicalTrace + trace_dual_scaling); a CONSTRUCAO para a rede escolhida segue OPEN

external_known_theorems.name: Shannon H(1/2,1/2)=log 2 (controle numerico da rota entropica)
external_known_theorems.citation: controle conceitual interno (rota Shannon REJEITADA para a Meia-Nat)
external_known_theorems.exact_role: log 2 != 1/2 nat: a Meia-Nat NAO vem de entropia de Shannon; nao formalizado em Lean

external_known_theorems.name: indice de Jones / construcao basica
external_known_theorems.citation: Jones, Invent. Math. 72 (1983) 1-25; Kosaki, J. Funct. Anal. 66 (1986) 123-140 (extensao a fatores arbitrarios)
external_known_theorems.exact_role: indice como impedancia da inclusao; e_N implementa E_0 (e x e = E_0(x) e); E_1(e_N) = peso de Markov. A FORMA em DADOS ja' migrou (JonesTowerData, v26); a identificacao [M:N]=1/beta para a inclusao dos Three Locks segue [CONJ]

external_known_theorems.name: esperancas condicionais (Tomiyama) / normalidade
external_known_theorems.citation: Tomiyama 1957; Takesaki, Theory of Operator Algebras
external_known_theorems.exact_role: bimodularidade e fidelidade migraram como DADOS (ConditionalExpectationData, v26); NORMALIDADE (continuidade sigma-fraca) nao-enunciavel sem topologia de vN -- fica aqui
external_known_theorems.finite_version_kernel_proved: TGLExt.diagExpect_bimod / eD_Lmul_eD (v33; dimensao FINITA, nao substitui o continuo)

external_known_theorems.name: Tomita-Takesaki (teoria modular)
external_known_theorems.citation: Tomita 1967; Takesaki, Lecture Notes in Math. 128 (1970); Bratteli-Robinson I
external_known_theorems.exact_role: S=J.Delta^{1/2}, sigma_t=Ad(Delta^{it}), KMS -- o fundamento de TODA a cadeia modular; no CONTINUO segue externo (sem teoria de vN na mathlib). A VERSAO FINITO-DIMENSIONAL COMPLETA (S, Delta, J, polar, KMS algebraico+dinamico, fluxo unitario, pontos fixos, bicomutante concreto, JMJ=M', MASA) e' KERNEL PROVED na lib TGLExt (v33) -- sombra finita verificada, NAO o teorema III_1

open_witness_obligations: local type III_1 proved in Lean
zero spectral projection belongs to the core
projection has positive finite canonical trace
modular conjugation yields equal face split
not_claimed: Python did not prove any theorem; the Lean kernel did
Bisognano-Wichmann / Reeh-Schlieder / type III_1 classification are KNOWN/EXTERNAL, not formalized here
the finite Three-Locks corner is a finite-dimensional theorem, NOT a type III_1 proof
G is a variable / measured input; it is NOT derived
no inhabitant of TGLSpecificAQFTWitness is constructed
